code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut have = false
    mut neg = false
    mut acc = 0
    mut output = ""
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          if have
            mut val = acc
            if neg
              val = -val
            end
            let sq = val * val
            if first
              output = "#{sq}"
              first = false
            else
              output = "#{output} #{sq}"
            end
            have = false
            neg = false
            acc = 0
          end
        else if b == 45
          neg = true
        else if b == 43
          acc = acc
        else
          acc = acc * 10 + (b - 48)
          have = true
        end
      when None
        acc = acc
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if have
      mut val = acc
      if neg
        val = -val
      end
      let sq = val * val
      if first
        output = "#{sq}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{sq}"
      end
    end
    println(output)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
